mapper.select: select id, entrustment_no, entrust_type,entrust_company, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, is_save, business_acceptor,seal_type,count_price AS paymentCount,address,addressee,mobile,mailbox from test_entrusted_info where id = #{id}

SELECT id, entrustment_no, entrust_company, entrust_people, project_name, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, state FROM test_entrusted_info
and entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and state = #{state}
ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id AS id, t1.entrustment_no AS entrustment_no, t1.entrust_company AS entrust_company, t1.entrust_people AS entrust_people, t1.business_acceptor AS business_acceptor, t1.acceptance_date AS acceptance_date, CONCAT(t3.sample_name,"(",")") AS sampleStatus FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel as t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample as t3 ON t3.id = t2.sample_id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t1.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.state = #{state}
ORDER BY t1.entrustment_no DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel(sample_id, entrust_id, check_item_id, standard_id, method_id, times, unit_price ) VALUES
(#{item.sampleId},#{item.entrustId},#{item.checkItemId},#{item.standardId},#{item.methodId},#{item.times},#{item.unitPrice})
insert into test_entrusted_payment_record_info(entrustment_id, price, time, operator ) values (#{entrustmentId},#{price},#{time},#{operator})

insert into test_entrusted_info(id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_company, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, seal_type, is_save, count_price, address, addressee, mobile, mailbox ) values (#{id}, #{entrustmentNo}, #{entrustType}, #{entrustCompany}, #{entrustPeople}, #{entrustPhone}, #{witnessUint}, #{witnessPerson}, #{witnessPhone}, #{projectName}, #{projectPart}, #{samplingMethod}, #{checkPurpose}, #{reportCount}, #{reportType}, #{requestDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{presentInformation}, #{businessAcceptor}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{team}, #{state}, #{remark}, #{invalidReason}, #{operateUser}, #{operateDate}, #{fileUrl}, #{sealType}, #{isSave}, #{countPrice}, #{address}, #{addressee}, #{mobile}, #{mailbox} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_entrusted_info
entrust_type=#{entrustType}, business_acceptor=#{businessAcceptor}, entrust_company=#{entrustCompany}, entrust_people=#{entrustPeople}, entrust_phone=#{entrustPhone}, witness_uint=#{witnessUint}, witness_person=#{witnessPerson}, witness_phone=#{witnessPhone}, project_name=#{projectName}, sampling_method=#{samplingMethod}, project_part=#{projectPart}, check_purpose=#{checkPurpose}, sampling_method=#{samplingMethod}, report_count=#{reportCount}, report_type=#{reportType}, request_date=#{requestDate}, payment_method=#{paymentMethod},
present_information=#{presentInformation}, acceptance_date=#{acceptanceDate}, team=#{team}, state=#{state}, remark=#{remark}, file_url=#{fileUrl}, seal_type=#{sealType}, is_save=#{isSave}, count_price=#{countPrice}, address=#{address}, adress=#{addressee}, adress=#{mobile}, adress=#{mailbox},
where id = #{id} and entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT sample_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT sum(price) FROM test_entrusted_payment_record_info WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT t2.name FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_init_data as t2 ON t1.payment_method = t2.id WHERE t1.id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT t2.address FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_company as t2 ON t1.entrust_company = t2.company_name WHERE t1.id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT s.name FROM test_standard_file s LEFT JOIN test_product_standard_file_rel sf ON s.id = sf.standard_file_id WHERE sf.product_id = #{productId} AND s.type IN (2, 3)
